summary: Completed comprehensive testing of offer creation issues. Backend APIs working perfectly (9/9 tests passed), but frontend button interaction issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Submit button not detectable by automated testing tools despite being visually present
ui_bugs.details: Button appears correctly in UI but may be implemented as div with click handlers instead of proper button element

integration_issues.issue: Unable to complete full frontend flow testing due to button detection issues
integration_issues.details: Frontend loads correctly and forms are fillable, but button interactions fail in automation

passed_tests: POST /api/offers - Successfully creates new offers with unique codes
Offer creation increments offer count (7 → 8 offers)
New establishment user flow - Correctly returns 404 for users without establishment
Frontend loads correctly with proper login form
Form fields are fillable with test credentials
No JavaScript errors or console errors detected
action_item_for_main_agent: Frontend button interaction issue: The 'Entrar' button in the login form and potentially the 'Publicar Oferta' button may be implemented incorrectly. Backend APIs are working perfectly - the issue is likely in frontend JavaScript event handling. Recommend checking: 1) Button elements use proper HTML button tags with type='submit', 2) Form submission handlers are properly attached, 3) Event listeners are not being blocked by overlays or z-index issues.
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (9/9 tests passed), Frontend: 60% (UI loads but button interactions fail)
